name: whataxiom-studio
description: Automated YouTube video production pipeline for a faceless stickman animation channel.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
